LightningComponentBundle.description: Pro-code payment form — a drop-in replacement for a payment Flow screen. Amount, currency and frequency are set by the admin; the payer enters their details and pays.

property.name: currency
property.label: Currency
property.description: ISO currency code shown next to the amount (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP).

property.name: amount
property.label: Amount
property.description: Amount the payer is charged. Set by the admin; shown read-only to the payer.

property.name: defaultFrequency
property.label: Frequency
property.description: Payment frequency. Set by the admin; shown read-only to the payer.

property.name: startDate
property.label: Recurring Start Date
property.description: Start date (yyyy-mm-dd) for recurring payments. Required by the Payment API; if left blank, today's date is used.
